items.name_en: 🌷《With full original green box packaging》🌷Children's Rabbit Print Tote Bag. The 2024 Early Spring Children's Collection ingeniously blends circular interlocking double-G and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting the tailored style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in various colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci rabbit print, cleverly incorporating a red contrasting trim. Multi-colored Supreme canvas, red Supreme canvas trim, Gucci rabbit print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
items.name_cn:
🌷《With full original green box packaging》🌷Children's Rabbit Print Tote Bag. The 2024 Early Spring Children's Collection ingeniously blends circular interlocking double-G and playful frog embroidery, playfully interpreting the tailored style. New apparel pieces and accessories are presented in various colors and materials, playfully highlighting the brand's narrative of childlike innocence. This tote bag is exquisitely embellished with the Gucci rabbit print, cleverly incorporating a red contrasting trim. Multi-colored Supreme canvas, red Supreme canvas trim, Gucci rabbit print by Walter Harrison Cady, nylon lining, open interior pocket, double handles (8.5cm high), magnetic snap closure.
Model: 605614.
Dimensions: 25(L) x 28.5(W) x 11cm(T)
Color: Red/pvc rabbit print.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Mini Shoulder Bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 bag, inspired by the brand's equestrian heritage with its double ring and long strip design. This mini shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas with a unique heat-pressed pattern for a soft and refined touch.
Exclusive to Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Interior: 1 main compartment
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Italian creation
Model: 815205
Dimensions: 20(L) x 14.5(W) x 5.1cm(H)
Color: White PVC / Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 🌷Includes original green box packaging🌷【New Arrival】GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
items.name_cn:
🌷Includes original green box packaging🌷【New Arrival】GG Marmont Ultra Mini Bag
From mirror leather to sparkling crystals, Gucci celebrates the gifting season with dazzling pieces. Choose printed accessories or glossy leather wallets to inject vitality into your look. This GG Marmont Ultra Mini bag is crafted with silver metallic leather. Silver metallic V-shaped leather, silver-tone hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, includes key charm that can be attached separately, double-G, chain shoulder strap (60cm long), weight: approx. 0.35kg
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, card holder, and lipstick
Model: 476433
Dimensions: 16.5(L) x 10(H) x 4.5cm(D)
Color: Silver full leather/Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 🌷Style 735145. The new GG brand series continues the design philosophy that items should not just be trendy for a season, but timeless. The classic interlocking letter element, derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci, continues to infuse brand identity charm into new designs. This Ophidia series small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas with double G hardware.

items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】GG Marmont Small Shoulder Bag
From mirror leather to sparkling crystals and elegant velvet, Gucci celebrates the gift-giving season with a variety of items. Choose from the brand's curated iconic handbags to inject a touch of vitality into your entire look. Silver metallic leather, vintage shiny palladium gold hardware, red cotton-linen lining, double G, zippered interior pocket. The slide chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm height). Spring buckle flap. Weight: approx. 0.648kg
Maximum capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods headphones, long wallet, and lipstick
Model: 443497.
Size: 26(L) x 15(H) x 7cm(D).
Color: Silver full leather/Original leather.

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
items.name_cn:
🌷With full original green box packaging🌷【New】Medium shoulder bag from the GG Emblem series
The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, handcrafted as a collectible choice for years to come. This medium shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new iconic collection, featuring a adjustable shoulder strap with grommets, paying tribute to Gucci's history with the equestrian world.
Black glossy leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Gold-tone Gucci script print
Black microfiber lining
Also comes with a D-ring for hanging removable items
Grommets on adjustable shoulder strap
Interior: 1 zip pocket
Zipper closure
Weight: approx. 0.5kg
Fits: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, long wallet, and lipstick
Model: 815217.
Medium Dimensions: 37cm (W) x 23cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Color: Black full leather/Original leather.

items.name_en: 🌷With full original green box packaging🌷GG Marmont Quilted Mini Bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's evolving aesthetic. As a highlight of the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, the leather goods collection is presented in a sophisticated taupe, signaling the arrival of a new season. This GG Marmont Mini Bag is presented in a dazzling way, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Taupe V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with a burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining with double-G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate interior pockets, zip coin pocket, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high), snap closure.
